sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n3905" key="a)lgunth/r" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀλγ-υντήρ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῆρος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n3905.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">causing pain</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τινῶν</foreign> Orac. ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2687.tlg001:1:57" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Zos.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.57</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
